---
title: "GLEAM full spatial transcriptomics workflow"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GLEAM full spatial transcriptomics workflow}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 7.4,
  fig.height = 5.3,
  out.width = "88%",
  dpi = 120
)
library(GLEAM)
```

## 1) Spatial object construction

```{r full-spatial-object, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=7.6, fig.height=5.6, out.width="92%"}
library(Seurat)
data("spatial_medium_expr", package = "GLEAM")
data("spatial_medium_meta", package = "GLEAM")
data("spatial_medium_coords", package = "GLEAM")

sp_seu <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = spatial_medium_expr, meta.data = spatial_medium_meta)
sp_seu <- NormalizeData(sp_seu)
sp_seu <- FindVariableFeatures(sp_seu)
sp_seu <- ScaleData(sp_seu)
sp_seu <- RunPCA(sp_seu)
sp_seu <- RunUMAP(sp_seu, dims = 1:20)

# Show object context before scoring
dim(sp_seu)
sp_seu
head(sp_seu@meta.data[, c("sample", "group", "region", "section", "x", "y")])
DimPlot(sp_seu, reduction = "umap", group.by = "region", pt.size = 0.35)
```

## 2) Geneset scoring in spatial context

```{r full-spatial-score, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE)}
gs <- get_geneset("hallmark", source = "builtin", species = "human")

sp <- score_signature(
  object = sp_seu,
  geneset = gs,
  geneset_source = "list",
  seurat = TRUE,
  assay = "RNA",
  layer = "data",
  slot = "data",
  method = "rank"
)
```

## 3) Spatial visualization (true spatial context)

```{r full-spatial-map, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=7.6, fig.height=5.6, out.width="92%"}
coords <- data.frame(
  x = sp_seu@meta.data$x,
  y = sp_seu@meta.data$y,
  row.names = rownames(sp_seu@meta.data)
)

# Slice/tissue-like background (replace with true tissue image when available)
tissue_bg <- as.raster(matrix(colorRampPalette(c("#f8f5ea", "#e8dcc4", "#d2b48c"))(256), nrow = 16))

plot_spatial_score(sp, pathway = rownames(sp$score)[1], coords = coords, image = tissue_bg)
plot_spatial_score(sp, pathway = rownames(sp$score)[2], coords = coords, split.by = "section", image = tissue_bg)
plot_spatial_multi(sp, pathways = rownames(sp$score)[1:4], coords = coords)
```

## 4) Spatial differential analysis

```{r full-spatial-diff, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=7.6, fig.height=5.6, out.width="92%"}
# region vs region
res_region <- test_signature(sp, region = "region", level = "region", method = "wilcox")

# group vs group within region
res_group_region <- test_signature(
  sp,
  region = "region",
  group = "group",
  sample = "sample",
  level = "sample_region",
  method = "wilcox"
)

top_sp <- res_group_region$table$pathway[order(res_group_region$table$p_adj)][1]
plot_spatial_score(sp, pathway = top_sp, coords = coords, image = tissue_bg, split.by = "region")
plot_spatial_compare(res_group_region)
```

## 5) Optional embedding linkage and trajectory-like display

```{r full-spatial-embedding-link, eval=requireNamespace("Seurat", quietly = TRUE), fig.width=7.6, fig.height=5.6, out.width="92%"}
plot_embedding_score(sp, pathway = rownames(sp$score)[1], object = sp_seu, reduction = "umap")
plot_pseudotime_score(sp, pathway = rownames(sp$score)[1], pseudotime = "pseudotime", lineage = "lineage")
```
